title: Ore borders for mods
description: This resource pack adds outlines to modded ores.
body:
# Ore borders for mods
This resource pack currently adds **250+ new textures for ores**. It does not require OptiFine or any other dependencies to function.

**List of supported mods as of version 1.0.2:**
- [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)
- [Aether Addon: Overworld Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether-overworld-ores)
- [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves)
- [Ancient Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/ancient-aether)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Create: Metallurgy](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-metallurgy)
- [Create: New Age](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-new-age)
- [Deep Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-aether)
- [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)
- [ExtraGems](https://modrinth.com/mod/extragems)
- [Galosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/galosphere)
- [Immersive Engineering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering)
- [Marium's Soulslike Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/mariums-soulslike-weaponry)
- [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism)
- [Mekanism: Ad Astra Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-ad-astra-ores)
- [More Ores More Gems](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-ores-more-gem/gallery)
- [Oreganized](https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized)
- [Scorched Guns 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/scorched-guns-2)
- [Stalwart Dungeons](https://modrinth.com/mod/stalwart-dungeons)
- [Sully's Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/sullysmod)
- [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)
- [The Aether: Redux](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-aether-redux)
- [Thermal Foundation](https://modrinth.com/mod/thermal-foundation)
- [Tinkers' Construct](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct)
